positive: Stylized vector graphic of a whimsical forest scene with glowing fireflies and stylized crescent moons. The composition should be symmetrical and central, featuring silhouettes of tall, ethereal fantasy flora (like giant ferns and bioluminescent mushrooms) intertwining with gentle, stylized river curves. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, soft lavender, and brilliant gold accents for the glow. The aesthetic should mimic modern tattoo art combined with celestial pattern design, perfectly suited for direct apparel printing. Solid background areas are preferred for clean cut-out designs.
